scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (profiles, named_lists, company_lists); HiBob is a read-only HR data source in the legacy connector (capabilities.write is false, no obviously-safe reverse-ETL writes).

excluded.reason: time-off approval/request workflows are outside this bundle's HR profile, named-list, and people-field read scope
employee document endpoints expose file/document resources rather than the structured HR records modeled by this bundle
employee-profile mutation is not enabled for this read-only HR source bundle and has no reverse-ETL action contract here
